requirement: Replace top 10 in-memory stores with PostgreSQL. This is the foundation — all other structural improvements depend on real persistence.

tasks.title: PostgreSQL store for instruments + orders + trades + positions
tasks.description:
Create PostgreSQL implementations for the 4 core trading stores. These are the highest-traffic stores.

The existing pg_store.go in securities-service has PgInstrumentStore and PgOrderStore shells. Enhance them and add PgTradeStore + PgPositionStore.

Read src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go for interface definitions.
Read src/securities-service/internal/store/pg_store.go for existing PG implementations.
Read infrastructure/db/migrations/V26__securities_instruments.sql, V27__securities_trading.sql for table schemas.

For each store:
1. Implement ALL interface methods using database/sql with positional params ($1, $2...)
2. Use ace_securities schema (post-V30 rename)
3. Handle sql.ErrNoRows → store.ErrNotFound
4. Use RETURNING * on inserts to get auto-generated fields
5. Build dynamic WHERE clauses for List methods with filters
6. Use transactions where multiple operations must be atomic

PgInstrumentStore — enhance existing:
- Create: INSERT INTO ace_securities.instruments with all 22+ fields
- Get: SELECT with all fields
- List: dynamic WHERE for asset_class, trading_status, exchange_code, search (ILIKE), segment_id
- Update: dynamic SET for non-empty fields, always set updated_at
- UpdateStatus: UPDATE trading_status + updated_at

PgOrderStore — enhance existing:
- Submit: INSERT with all SecurityOrder fields including iceberg (hidden_qty, visible_qty)
- Get/List/Cancel/Update: complete implementations

PgTradeStore — NEW:
- Create: INSERT INTO ace_securities.trades
- Get: by ID
- List: by instrument_id, participant_id, date range
- ListByInstrument: filtered list

PgPositionStore — NEW:
- GetOrCreate: SELECT or INSERT if not exists (UPSERT)
- Update: UPDATE quantity, avg_cost, market_value, unrealized_pnl
- List: by participant_id, with optional instrument_id filter

Update cmd/securities-service/main.go:
- Check DATABASE_URL env var
- If set: create all PG stores, import pgx driver
- If not: fall back to in-memory (preserve existing behavior)

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: PostgreSQL store for markets + firms + participants + settlement
tasks.description:
Create PostgreSQL implementations for the exchange operations stores.

Read src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go for MarketStore, SegmentStore, FirmStore, ParticipantStore, SettlementStore interfaces.
Read infrastructure/db/migrations/V26-V30 for table schemas.

Create src/securities-service/internal/store/pg_store_ops.go (separate file to avoid pg_store.go getting too large):

PgMarketStore:
- Create/Get/List/UpdateStatus against ace_securities.markets (if table exists) or platform.tenants

PgSegmentStore:
- Create/Get/ListByMarket against segments table

PgFirmStore:
- Create/Get/List/UpdateStatus

PgParticipantStore:
- Create/Get/List/GetByFirmID/UpdateStatus/UpdatePermissions
- Permissions stored as text[] or jsonb array

PgSettlementStore:
- Create/Get/ListByDate/ListByStatus/UpdateStatus
- Settlement obligations with accrued interest

PgAuditStore:
- Log: INSERT append-only
- List: dynamic WHERE with entity_type, entity_id, actor_id, start_date, end_date

All implementations follow the same pattern as T1:
- database/sql, positional params, ErrNoRows handling
- Dynamic WHERE builder for filtered lists
- Wire into main.go DATABASE_URL check

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Database migration runner + connection pool + health check
tasks.description:
Add database infrastructure to securities-service.

Part A — Connection pool setup:
Create src/securities-service/internal/db/pool.go:
- NewPool(databaseURL string) (*sql.DB, error) — open connection with pgx driver
- Configure: max open conns (25), max idle (5), conn max lifetime (5min)
- Ping on creation to verify connectivity
- HealthCheck(db *sql.DB) error — simple SELECT 1

Part B — Migration runner (optional, for dev):
Create src/securities-service/internal/db/migrate.go:
- RunMigrations(db *sql.DB, migrationsDir string) error
- Read .sql files from infrastructure/db/migrations/ in order
- Execute each within a transaction
- Track applied migrations in a migrations table
- For production: use Flyway/external tool. This is for dev convenience.

Part C — Update main.go:
- Use db.NewPool for connection
- Add DB health to /healthz response: {status: ok, db: connected/disconnected}
- Graceful shutdown: close DB pool on SIGTERM

Part D — Update docker-compose.yml:
- Add DATABASE_URL env to securities-service: postgres://garudax:garudax_dev_password@postgres:5432/garudax?sslmode=disable

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for PostgreSQL stores
tasks.description:
Write tests that verify PG store implementations compile and have correct SQL patterns.

Since we can't run against a real DB in the test environment, write tests that:
1. Verify store constructors accept *sql.DB
2. Verify all interface methods exist (compile-time check via interface assignment)
3. Test SQL query building helpers (dynamic WHERE clause construction)
4. Test error mapping (sql.ErrNoRows → ErrNotFound)

Create src/securities-service/internal/store/pg_store_test.go:
- TestPgInstrumentStore_ImplementsInterface — var _ InstrumentStore = &PgInstrumentStore{}
- TestPgOrderStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgTradeStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgPositionStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgMarketStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgFirmStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgParticipantStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgSettlementStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestPgAuditStore_ImplementsInterface
- TestBuildWhereClause — test dynamic WHERE builder if extracted as helper
- TestNewPool_InvalidURL — verify error on bad connection string

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
